title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving between Accounts linked to the same Tenant
scenario: Verify data consistency when switching between different accounts linked to the same tenant
steps: Start the app and log in with Account linked to Tenant A.
Go to Poly Lens Menu > Support > App.
Verify that Tenant A info is present.
Go to Poly Lens Menu > General > Account.
Log in with a different Account that is also linked to Tenant A.
Go to Poly Lens Menu > Support > App.
Verify that Tenant A info is still present.
expected: Tenant A info is present after logging in with the first account, and Tenant A info is still present after logging in with a different account linked to the same Tenant A.
